prompt: Fetch me the name and possibly the website of the research lab run by professor Zhicheng Liu
answer:
Professor Zhicheng Liu runs the **Human-Data Interaction Group** (also referred to as Human-Data Interaction Research Group) at the University of Maryland, College Park.

**Lab Website:** https://hdi.cs.umd.edu/

The lab is affiliated with the Human-Computer Interaction Lab (HCIL) at UMD and focuses on interactive data analysis and data-driven visual communication by synthesizing human-centered methodologies and artificial intelligence.

prompt: Go to https://www.cs.umd.edu/people/faculty and Fetch me the name and possibly the website of the research lab run by professor Zhicheng Liu
Go to https://www.cs.umd.edu/people/faculty and Fetch me the name and possibly the website of the research lab run by professor Zhicheng Liu
answer:
Professor: Zhicheng Liu
Lab Name: Human-Data Interaction Research Group
Lab Website: https://hdi.cs.umd.edu/
Additional context: The lab is a research group in the Department of Computer Science at University of Maryland, College Park. They are affiliated with the Human-Computer Interaction Lab (HCIL) at UMD. The lab's mission is to support interactive data analysis and data-driven visual communication by synthesizing human-centered methodologies and artificial intelligence. Their work spans the areas of data visualization, visual analytics, human-computer interaction, and machine learning.
